message:
Command `
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

echo "=== Resuming DRT: librelane --last-run -F OpenROAD.DetailedRouting ==="
echo "PDK_ROOT=$PDK_ROOT"
echo "Start time: $(date)"

librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/apps/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --last-run \
  -F OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
  config.json \
  2>&1 | tee /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
` executed with exit code -1.

message.content: Everything is confirmed. The run stopped cleanly at the start of step 69 (DRT 0th iteration). Timing pre-DRT is **perfect**: WNS=0, TNS=0. Input ODB (143 MB from antenna-repair step 67) is intact. Launching DRT resume now.
